title: lindernia nummulariifolia
intro: Lindernia nummulariifolia, also known as Coin-flower Lindernia or Moneywort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Linderniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lindernia nummulariifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Lindernia nummulariifolia include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
